title: selaginella plumosa f. tetragonostachya
intro: Selaginella plumosa f. tetragonostachya is a type of evergreen, epiphytic plant belonging to the spikemoss family (Selaginellaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and exhibiting antiviral and antibacterial properties. In herbal preparations, Selaginella plumosa f. tetragonostachya is often used in infusions, teas, and tinctures, and is sometimes combined with other plants to enhance its medicinal effects.
